prestazioni: Engine swap to a Hyundai/Kia 2.2L CRDi D4HB (D4HB-22) diesel with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger (80mm compressor wheel, 62mm turbine wheel) paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a custom-tuned ECU via KESS V2 for 320hp and 550Nm of torque on 98 RON fuel

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (part #QDF75A) in the rear axle, upgraded CV joints from GKN (part #307285), and a custom 3.73:1 gear ratio set from Transtar (part #40-2303) for the 5-speed manual transmission (M035)

Suspension overhaul with Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (height-adjustable, 400lb/in front springs, 500lb/in rear springs), custom polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0116K) for the front control arms, and a Whiteline 24mm rear sway bar (part #BKR63XZ) to reduce body roll
estetica: Custom widebody kit from Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Terracan kit, part #LB-HYTERRACAN) with carbon fiber fender flares, extended rocker panels, and a custom front splitter with integrated LED daytime running lights

OEM+ interior upgrade with Recaro SR-7 XL seats (part #389.01.001) in Alcantara and black leather, a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (part #0111201211) with a quick-release hub, and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay from Seibon (part #HY-INT-TERRA-DASH)

Aggressive off-road stance with Method MR701 VT-Spec wheels (17x9 +12mm offset, part #MR701-179012VT) wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 tires (285/70R17), paired with custom 2-inch lift spacers from Rough Country (part #23000) and a custom rear bumper with integrated swing-out tire carrier from ARB (part #ARB3500120)
